tasks.title: Implement dark mode and light mode theme switching
tasks.description: Add theme switching functionality to the application. Read existing files: src/App.jsx, src/App.css, src/index.css, src/main.jsx. Implement: 1) Create a theme context or state in App.jsx to manage current theme ('light' or 'dark'), 2) Add CSS variables in index.css for both themes (--bg-color, --text-color, --primary-color, --secondary-color, --card-bg, etc.), 3) Create a theme toggle button component in src/components/ThemeToggle.jsx with corresponding ThemeToggle.css, 4) Apply theme class ('light-theme' or 'dark-theme') to root element based on current theme, 5) Update existing component CSS files to use CSS variables instead of hardcoded colors, 6) Add localStorage persistence to remember user's theme preference across sessions, 7) Write tests in src/App.test.jsx and src/components/ThemeToggle.test.jsx to verify theme switching, localStorage persistence, and CSS class application.
acceptance_criteria: User can toggle between light and dark themes using a toggle button
Theme preference is persisted in localStorage
All pages and components render correctly in both themes
Theme toggle button is accessible and functional
Tests pass for theme switching functionality

tasks.title: Validate theme switching implementation
tasks.description: Run the test suite for theme switching functionality using 'npx vitest run src/App.test.jsx src/components/ThemeToggle.test.jsx'. Verify that all tests pass, including theme toggle, localStorage persistence, and CSS class application. Check that no console errors occur when switching themes.
acceptance_criteria: No console errors when switching themes
UI is readable and visually correct in both themes
